lbugr 0.1.0
  • Getting Started
  • Reference
    • Getting Started
    • Getting Started with lbugr
    • Installation and Usage
    • Installation and Basic Usage
    • Graph Library Integrations
    • Graph Library Integrations
  • Changelog
Provides a high-performance 'R' interface to the 'ladybug' graph database. Uses the 'reticulate' package to wrap the official Python 'real_ladybug' client. Enables seamless interaction with Ladybug from within 'R' for managing database connections, executing Cypher queries, and loading data from R data frames. Converts query results into popular 'R' data structures including 'tibble', 'igraph', 'tidygraph', and 'g6R' objects for analysis and visualization workflows.
